name: Jana and Talia
description:
#33

Its been years since you have sexual relationship with Jana, your step sister, and Talia, Jana's cousin. The two of them always try to compete who are better at sex making you choose from the two of them. One day, Talia decide to invite Jana and you on a vacation to a beautiful beach on an island and wants you three to have some "fun".

HAVE FUN AND ENJOY EVERYONE!!

(all characters are 18+)
